Use `./bin/ssh-app.sh status`, `./bin/ssh-db.sh status`, `./bin/ssh-db.sh promote`, `./bin/ssh-db.sh health`, `./bin/ssh-app.sh restart`, `./bin/ssh-app.sh health`, and `./bin/rollback.sh`.
